headline: 3 Small-Cap Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: Many small-cap stocks have limited Wall Street coverage, giving savvy investors the chance to act before everyone else catches on. But the flip side is that these businesses have increased downside risk because they lack the scale and staying power of their larger competitors.

raw.headline: 3 Small-Cap Stocks We Approach with Caution
raw.summary: Many small-cap stocks have limited Wall Street coverage, giving savvy investors the chance to act before everyone else catches on. But the flip side is that these businesses have increased downside risk because they lack the scale and staying power of their larger competitors.

headline: FactSet Announces Appointments of Chief AI Officer and Chief Technology Officer to Accelerate Enterprise AI and Platform Strategy
summary: NORWALK, Conn., March 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (NYSE:FDS | NASDAQ:FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced the appointments of Kate Stepp as Chief AI Officer and Bob Stolte as Chief Technology Officer, effective March 2, 2026. These appointments reinforce FactSet’s continued focus on harnessing artificial intelligence capabilities to enhance client value across its global technology platform. headline: Is It Time To Revisit FactSet Research Systems (FDS) After A 49% One Year Share Price Fall
summary: If you are wondering whether FactSet Research Systems is starting to look like value at its current share price, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying about the stock. The share price closed at US$222.87, with recent returns of 10.6% over 7 days, a 12.4% decline over 30 days, a 21.8% decline year to date and a 49.2% decline over 1 year, with a 43.8% decline over 3 years and a 25.0% decline over 5 years. These moves have kept FactSet on the radar for investors who...
